title: Release Notes
text:
Added

segment_masked() for missing-data-safe segmentation with the same clustering logic as segment().
build_starlet_mask() and segment_starlet() for Sagui-style white-light starlet masking before clustering.
summarize_cluster_spectra() for median, summed, and inverse-variance-weighted cluster spectra.
choose_ncomp_by_snr() for variance-aware component selection from an SNR threshold.
scripts/run_manga_starlet_comparison.R for a full-frame MaNGA comparison workflow.

title: Release Notes
text:
Changed

segment() and segment_masked() now share the same internal segmentation core.
torch is now optional; Capivara falls back to base R distance calculations when torch is unavailable.
segment_robust() and cube_cluster_with_snr() are preserved as compatibility wrappers around the new API.
GitHub and website documentation now describe the missing-data, starlet-mask, and variance-aware workflows.

title: Release Notes
text:
Fixed

plot_cluster_spectra() now uses the intended pixel within each cluster instead of repeatedly reusing the first pixel.
The Sagui comparison workflow now preserves the full cube dimensions rather than applying the starlet mask on a cropped cube.
Signal and noise estimation no longer produces warnings when row sums are non-positive.

title: Capivara
text:
Capivara provides spectral segmentation tools for Integral Field Unit (IFU) data cubes. Version 0.2.0 adds a missing-data-safe segmentation path, Sagui-style white-light starlet masking, variance-aware spectral summaries, and SNR-guided component selection while keeping the original segment() workflow intact.







Current Capivara Mosaic
Sagui Comparison Mosaic









Left: the current Capivara segmentation mosaic used in the package documentation. Right: the Sagui comparison mosaic for the same style of visual summary.




segment_masked() reproduces segment() while handling missing channels.
segment_starlet() adds a Sagui-style starlet mask from the white-light image.
summarize_cluster_spectra() supports median, summed, and weighted spectra.
choose_ncomp_by_snr() selects Ncomp from a variance-aware SNR cut.
torch is now optional.




install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("RafaelSdeSouza/capivara")
library(capivara)
Optional GPU acceleration:
install.packages("torch")
torch::install_torch()





cube <- FITSio::readFITS("manga-8140-12703-LOGCUBE.fits")
res <- segment(cube, Ncomp = 20)
plot_cluster(res)



res_masked <- segment_masked(cube, Ncomp = 20)



res_star <- segment_starlet(
  cube,
  Ncomp = 20,
  starlet_J = 5,
  starlet_scales = 2:5,
  include_coarse = FALSE,
  denoise_k = 0,
  positive_only = TRUE,
  mask_mode = "na"
)

plot_cluster(res_star)








var_cube <- FITSio::readFITS("manga-8140-12703-VARCUBE.fits")

choice <- choose_ncomp_by_snr(
  cube,
  var_cube = var_cube$imDat,
  k_values = 4:20,
  target_snr = 20
)

res <- segment(cube, Ncomp = choice$Ncomp)
spec_summary <- summarize_cluster_spectra(res, var_cube = var_cube$imDat)




Please cite de Souza et al. if you find this code useful in your research.




torch: Optional GPU-accelerated tensor computations.
ggplot2: Visualization.
FITSio: Reading and handling FITS files.
reshape2: Data manipulation.





MaNGA Survey: Bundy, Kevin, et al. “Overview of the SDSS-IV MaNGA Survey: Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory.” The Astrophysical Journal 798.1 (2015): 7. DOI: 10.1088/0004-637X/798/1/7
Capivara Methodology: Souza, R. S. de, et al. (2025). CAPIVARA: A spectral-based segmentation method for IFU data cubes. Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society, 539(4), 3166–3179. https://doi.org/10.1093/mnras/staf688
Torch in R: Paszke, Adam, et al. “PyTorch: An Imperative Style, High-Performance Deep Learning Library.” Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 2019.

title: About
text:
Capivara is an R package for segmentation and post-processing of IFU data cubes.
This documentation site is published from the Quarto sources in this repository and mirrors the GitHub README and release notes. Version 0.2.0 introduces:

missing-data-safe segmentation with segment_masked()
Sagui-style starlet masking with segment_starlet()
variance-aware summaries with summarize_cluster_spectra()
SNR-guided component selection with choose_ncomp_by_snr()

Repository: RafaelSdeSouza/capivara
Paper: Capivara: A spectral-based segmentation method for IFU data cubes
